annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under ORS 82.010(2) — 9% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). 9%/yr simple (ORS 82.010(2)(a)). Applies to money judgments; also accrues on pre-judgment interest that accrued before entry, and on attorney fees. Carve-out: judgments for professional negligence of Oregon Medical Board or State Board of Nursing licensees bear the lesser of 5% or the federal discount rate + 3% (ORS 82.010(2)(f)), not 9%. Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
